name: eset_protect
explanation: ESET Protect is a logs-only integration. The spec defines no Agent metric check; the only options are a `logs` template (TCP/UDP listener with a user-chosen port, source eset-protect). There is no datadog_checks/eset_protect/<name>.py — the package contains only metadata (__init__.py, __about__.py). Logs are forwarded from the ESET Protect Web Console, so there is no upstream service for the Agent to discover and probe. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply.
notes: Logs-only vendor security tile. Pattern N (instrumentation-only): no Agent check is dispatched against a live endpoint.
